title: platycoryne ochrantha
intro: Platycoryne ochrantha is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a powder or infused in hot water to make a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
